host.label: Bind host
host.description: Address the server listens on. Use 0.0.0.0 inside Docker/Podman containers so port mappings work.

config.label: Config file
config.description: Path to your drizzle.config.ts. Change for monorepos or custom config locations.

dialect.label: Database dialect
dialect.description: Database type. Controls connection guidance shown in the skill.
